closed_world.value: Secret government bio-weapon research compound in the Rocky Mountains
closed_world.quote: top secret government bio-weapon research project in the middle of the rocky mountains

resolution.value: Military missile strike destroys the city to contain the outbreak
resolution.quote: The Military decided to lunch a missile strike of the whole city killing thousands but saving billions

red_herring.value: Initial framing suggests research staff created the virus, but Jack (the Navy SEAL) may have been the actual source or catalyst
red_herring.quote: Johnson,the head of research and the one that had ordered the others to make this virus despite the affects of it

social_world.value: Military-industrial complex with clear hierarchy: Pentagon/HQ commands, research staff obeys, SEAL teams execute orders
social_world.quote: The computer system announced that the Military as been notified of the problem and they are flying the seal team in

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical transformation and behavioral evidence - infected victims show enlarged teeth, blood covering, loss of humanity
reveal_mechanic.quote: They were covered in blood and their teeth were bigger than normal

media_and_audience.value: Military cover-up through missile strike, destroying evidence and sacrificing thousands to prevent larger catastrophe
media_and_audience.quote: The Military decided to lunch a missile strike of the whole city killing thousands but saving billions of lives

investigator_wound.value: MD forced to kill his own infected brother, then commits suicide knowing he's been infected
investigator_wound.quote: I'm the one who suggested that you be chosen to be put into this program

_meta.title: ebook the general himself death come swiftly
